# files_expectation_evaluation (Data Source)

An ExpectationEvaluation records one open or closed window for an Expectation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "files_expectation_evaluation" "example_expectation_evaluation" {
  id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) ExpectationEvaluation ID

### Read-Only

- `closed_at` (String) When the evaluation row was finalized.
- `created_at` (String) Creation time.
- `criteria_errors` (List of String) Captured criteria failures for the window.
- `deadline_at` (String) Logical due boundary for schedule-driven windows.
- `expectation_id` (Number) Expectation ID.
- `hard_close_at` (String) Hard stop after which the window may not remain open.
- `late_acceptance_cutoff_at` (String) Logical cutoff for late acceptance, when present.
- `matched_files` (Dynamic) Captured evidence for files that matched the window.
- `missing_files` (Dynamic) Captured evidence for required files that were missing.
- `opened_at` (String) When the evaluation row was opened.
- `opened_via` (String) How the evaluation window was opened.
- `status` (String) Evaluation status.
- `summary` (Dynamic) Compact evaluator summary payload.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update time.
- `window_end_at` (String) Actual candidate cutoff boundary for the window.
- `window_start_at` (String) Logical start of the candidate window.
- `workspace_id` (Number) Workspace ID. `0` means the default workspace.
